TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Amis Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://ami.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_ami, title = {Amis Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://ami.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: == Augustin Siwsi == Augustin Siwsi (Br. Augustin Büchel, SMB; 1936-), masofoc i Switzerland, 23 ko mihecaan micomod i Paylenkay. Moetepay ko mihecaan no Paylenkay itini i Posong itiya, mangalay to tadamanay a kayki tamdaw, nanoya mala sa'ayaway cingra no Paylenkay a siwsi tayni i Taywan, itiya i 1966 miheca mida'oc ko kaitini i Taywan. Nai 1963 miheca miteka, tangasa i 2021 miheca ira ko 58 mihecaan ningra kaitini ningra i Taywan. O cahelakay ci Augustin Siwsi, maolah midadangoy, tangasa anini hinatayra cingra i riyar no Taypinyang, maolah talalotok micakil, i 1978 miheca patireng to micakilay to Xiangyang a lotok, mirakat to lotolotok, i 2015 miheca itira i Xiangyang a mihemek to 80 mihecaan no 'orip. Ci Augustin Siwsi o tataparan kiwiko, midipotay to taliyok a palowaday, mikihatiya patireng to Taytongsien midipotay to taliyok yofayof, misahalaka to Biwa fanaw kohetingay koying, i 1996 miheca mapakaolah to "Malalokay to liyok isian tadamanay tamdaw a kompay". Kalawidang sa to kilang hana ci Augustin Siwsi, aniniay Paylenkay taliyok saheto o nipalomaan ningra a kalohana. Saki ci Augustin Siwsian, ira ko hana kilang ato lotok mato niyaro'ay ningra. Ci Augustin Siwsi to saki Paylenkay a likisi ato kasasiromaan limelaen cingra. Talolong ko mahiratengay ningra to matelangay a kamaro'an, itira i matelangay kamaro'an matayal ira ko 3 mihecaan. Paretatenga cingra to katelangay kamaro'an miming tato, pasietip ko fawahan, saromi'ad sa fa'edet ko laloma'an, awaayho ko sapihpih to li'etecay (lengci) itiya, marorayan matayal. Itiya, 'aloman ko tayniay i Taywan a Simpu, macaco'co ko kamaro'an, itira saan ko roma Simpu i 'ariri patelian to lalosidan, kadademakan a mafoti', orasaka micoracor saka itira i Hangcu lalan mipatireng to fa'elohay kaitiraan. O Senmo isingan Tintokay i 1975 miheca miliyas to Posong, patorod hananay ko Renay siwnikay mikowan to isingan. Midotoc to ni Augustin Siwsi a mahiratengay, oya Senmo isingan Tintokay to saki Posong sa'etal a isingan ma'edengay ko matayalay tamdaw to padamaay midipot to adadaay itiya, nika miketon to piliyas, tayra i roma niyaro' mipatado to tamdaw. Midotoc to ni Augustin Siwsi, o ka'ayaw no fawhan mafalic ko sa'ayaway a halaka no Senmo isingan Tintokay. Saka wiliay no Senmo isingan Tintokay ira ko cecay tapangan a afinang, o nano nipalomaan ni Augustin Siwsi, o nano sera no Nokay koya ka'ayaw no Senmo isingan Tintokay, o nihaian no Nokay saka manga'ay a misadadahal (aniniay patelian to tosiya), nika ikor ka'ayaway no Senmo isingan Tintokay nipa'acaan to no Nokay, saka mafalicay oya aniniay to a kaitiraan. Roma, I'ayaw kafana'en ni Augustin Siwsi mifalic ko Tawu kiwkay, orasaka oya ka'ayawan no kiwkay nano nipalomaan a sepatay tapangan a afinang a tolo tapangan, nilinahan patayra i aayawan no Paylenkay, oya kawiliay no fawahan makorahay nicengelan toloay tapangan afinong. Ci Augustin Siwsi tayni i Taywan ira ko 58 miheca, i 2003 mihecaan mapakaolah no Taytongsien cenfo to tadamanay finawlan, i 2017 miheca maopatodong to no Conghuaminko a kacingangan, o "Tada Taywan a finawlan (tamdaw)".
S.PHON: == ao~u~u*o~u~ustin siwsi == ao~u~u*o~u~ustin siwsi (b~b~vr. ao~u~u*o~u~ustin b~b~v*ʦħəɾ, smb~b~v; ****-), maso~ufo~uʦ i swit*ərɾanɬ~ɮ, ** ko~u miħəʦaan miʦo~umo~uɬ~ɮ i pajɾənkaj. mo~uətəpaj ko~u miħəʦaan no~u pajɾənkaj itini i po~uso~uŋ itija, maŋaɾaj to~u taɬ~ɮamanaj a kajki tamɬ~ɮaw, nano~uja maɾa saʡajawaj ʦiŋra no~u pajɾənkaj a siwsi tajni i tajwan, itija i **** miħəʦa miɬ~ɮaʡo~uʦ ko~u kaitini i tajwan. nai **** miħəʦa mitəka, taŋasa i **** miħəʦa ira ko~u ** miħəʦaan niŋra kaitini niŋra i tajwan. o~u ʦaħəɾakaj ʦi ao~u~u*o~u~ustin siwsi, mao~uɾaħ miɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮaŋo~uj, taŋasa anini ħinatajra ʦiŋra i rijar no~u tajpinjaŋ, mao~uɾaħ taɾaɾo~uto~uk miʦakiɾ, i **** miħəʦa patirəŋ to~u miʦakiɾaj to~u xiaŋjaŋ a ɾo~uto~uk, mirakat to~u ɾo~uto~uɾo~uto~uk, i **** miħəʦa itira i xiaŋjaŋ a miħəmək to~u ** miħəʦaan no~u ʡo~urip. ʦi ao~u~u*o~u~ustin siwsi o~u tataparan kiwiko~u, miɬ~ɮipo~utaj to~u taɾijo~uk a paɾo~uwaɬ~ɮaj, mikiħatija patirəŋ to~u tajto~uŋsiən miɬ~ɮipo~utaj to~u taɾijo~uk jo~ufajo~uf, misaħaɾaka to~u b~b~viwa fanaw ko~uħətiŋaj ko~ujiŋ, i **** miħəʦa mapakao~uɾaħ to~u "maɾaɾo~ukaj to~u ɾijo~uk isian taɬ~ɮamanaj tamɬ~ɮaw a ko~umpaj". kaɾawiɬ~ɮaŋ sa to~u kiɾaŋ ħana ʦi ao~u~u*o~u~ustin siwsi, aniniaj pajɾənkaj taɾijo~uk saħəto~u o~u nipaɾo~umaan niŋra a kaɾo~uħana. saki ʦi ao~u~u*o~u~ustin siwsian, ira ko~u ħana kiɾaŋ ato~u ɾo~uto~uk mato~u nijaro~uʡaj niŋra. ʦi ao~u~u*o~u~ustin siwsi to~u saki pajɾənkaj a ɾikisi ato~u kasasiro~umaan ɾiməɾaən ʦiŋra. taɾo~uɾo~uŋ ko~u maħiratəŋaj niŋra to~u matəɾaŋaj a kamaro~uʡan, itira i matəɾaŋaj kamaro~uʡan matajaɾ ira ko~u * miħəʦaan. parətatəŋa ʦiŋra to~u katəɾaŋaj kamaro~uʡan mimiŋ tato~u, pasiətip ko~u fawaħan, saro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ sa faʡəɬ~ɮət ko~u ɾaɾo~umaʡan, awaajħo~u ko~u sapiħpiħ to~u ɾiʡətəʦaj (ɾəŋʦi) itija, maro~urajan matajaɾ. itija, ʡaɾo~uman ko~u tajniaj i tajwan a simpo~u~u, maʦaʦo~uʡʦo~u ko~u kamaro~uʡan, itira saan ko~u ro~uma simpo~u~u i ʡariri patəɾian to~u ɾaɾo~usiɬ~ɮan, kaɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮəmakan a mafo~utiʡ, o~urasaka miʦo~uraʦo~ur saka itira i ħaŋʦo~u~u ɾaɾan mipatirəŋ to~u faʡəɾo~uħaj kaitiraan. o~u sənmo~u isiŋan tinto~ukaj i **** miħəʦa miɾijas to~u po~uso~uŋ, pato~uro~uɬ~ɮ ħananaj ko~u rənaj siwnikaj miko~uwan to~u isiŋan. miɬ~ɮo~uto~uʦ to~u ni ao~u~u*o~u~ustin siwsi a maħiratəŋaj, o~uja sənmo~u isiŋan tinto~ukaj to~u saki po~uso~uŋ saʡətaɾ a isiŋan maʡəɬ~ɮəŋaj ko~u matajaɾaj tamɬ~ɮaw to~u paɬ~ɮamaaj miɬ~ɮipo~ut to~u aɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮaaj itija, nika mikəto~un to~u piɾijas, tajra i ro~uma nijaro~uʡ mipataɬ~ɮo~u to~u tamɬ~ɮaw. miɬ~ɮo~uto~uʦ to~u ni ao~u~u*o~u~ustin siwsi, o~u kaʡajaw no~u fawħan mafaɾiʦ ko~u saʡajawaj a ħaɾaka no~u sənmo~u isiŋan tinto~ukaj. saka wiɾiaj no~u sənmo~u isiŋan tinto~ukaj ira ko~u ʦəʦaj tapaŋan a afinaŋ, o~u nano~u nipaɾo~umaan ni ao~u~u*o~u~ustin siwsi, o~u nano~u səra no~u no~ukaj ko~uja kaʡajaw no~u sənmo~u isiŋan tinto~ukaj, o~u niħaian no~u no~ukaj saka maŋaʡaj a misaɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮaħaɾ (aniniaj patəɾian to~u to~usija), nika iko~ur kaʡajawaj no~u sənmo~u isiŋan tinto~ukaj nipaʡaʦaan to~u no~u no~ukaj, saka mafaɾiʦaj o~uja aniniaj to~u a kaitiraan. ro~uma, iʡajaw kafanaʡən ni ao~u~u*o~u~ustin siwsi mifaɾiʦ ko~u tawo~u~u kiwkaj, o~urasaka o~uja kaʡajawan no~u kiwkaj nano~u nipaɾo~umaan a səpataj tapaŋan a afinaŋ a to~uɾo~u tapaŋan, niɾinaħan patajra i aajawan no~u pajɾənkaj, o~uja kawiɾiaj no~u fawaħan mako~uraħaj niʦəŋəɾan to~uɾo~uaj tapaŋan afino~uŋ. ʦi ao~u~u*o~u~ustin siwsi tajni i tajwan ira ko~u ** miħəʦa, i **** miħəʦaan mapakao~uɾaħ no~u tajto~uŋsiən ʦənfo~u to~u taɬ~ɮamanaj finawɾan, i **** miħəʦa mao~upato~uɬ~ɮo~uŋ to~u no~u ʦo~uŋħo~u~uaminko~u a kaʦiŋaŋan, o~u "taɬ~ɮa tajwan a finawɾan (tamɬ~ɮaw)".
S.FORM: == Augustin Siwsi == Augustin Siwsi (Br. Augustin Büchel, SMB; 1936-), masofoc i Switzerland, 23 ko mihecaan micomod i Paylenkay. Moetepay ko mihecaan no Paylenkay itini i Posong itiya, mangalay to tadamanay a kayki tamdaw, nanoya mala sa'ayaway cingra no Paylenkay a siwsi tayni i Taywan, itiya i 1966 miheca mida'oc ko kaitini i Taywan. Nai 1963 miheca miteka, tangasa i 2021 miheca ira ko 58 mihecaan ningra kaitini ningra i Taywan. O cahelakay ci Augustin Siwsi, maolah midadangoy, tangasa anini hinatayra cingra i riyar no Taypinyang, maolah talalotok micakil, i 1978 miheca patireng to micakilay to Xiangyang a lotok, mirakat to lotolotok, i 2015 miheca itira i Xiangyang a mihemek to 80 mihecaan no 'orip. Ci Augustin Siwsi o tataparan kiwiko, midipotay to taliyok a palowaday, mikihatiya patireng to Taytongsien midipotay to taliyok yofayof, misahalaka to Biwa fanaw kohetingay koying, i 1996 miheca mapakaolah to "Malalokay to liyok isian tadamanay tamdaw a kompay". Kalawidang sa to kilang hana ci Augustin Siwsi, aniniay Paylenkay taliyok saheto o nipalomaan ningra a kalohana. Saki ci Augustin Siwsian, ira ko hana kilang ato lotok mato niyaro'ay ningra. Ci Augustin Siwsi to saki Paylenkay a likisi ato kasasiromaan limelaen cingra. Talolong ko mahiratengay ningra to matelangay a kamaro'an, itira i matelangay kamaro'an matayal ira ko 3 mihecaan. Paretatenga cingra to katelangay kamaro'an miming tato, pasietip ko fawahan, saromi'ad sa fa'edet ko laloma'an, awaayho ko sapihpih to li'etecay (lengci) itiya, marorayan matayal. Itiya, 'aloman ko tayniay i Taywan a Simpu, macaco'co ko kamaro'an, itira saan ko roma Simpu i 'ariri patelian to lalosidan, kadademakan a mafoti', orasaka micoracor saka itira i Hangcu lalan mipatireng to fa'elohay kaitiraan. O Senmo isingan Tintokay i 1975 miheca miliyas to Posong, patorod hananay ko Renay siwnikay mikowan to isingan. Midotoc to ni Augustin Siwsi a mahiratengay, oya Senmo isingan Tintokay to saki Posong sa'etal a isingan ma'edengay ko matayalay tamdaw to padamaay midipot to adadaay itiya, nika miketon to piliyas, tayra i roma niyaro' mipatado to tamdaw. Midotoc to ni Augustin Siwsi, o ka'ayaw no fawhan mafalic ko sa'ayaway a halaka no Senmo isingan Tintokay. Saka wiliay no Senmo isingan Tintokay ira ko cecay tapangan a afinang, o nano nipalomaan ni Augustin Siwsi, o nano sera no Nokay koya ka'ayaw no Senmo isingan Tintokay, o nihaian no Nokay saka manga'ay a misadadahal (aniniay patelian to tosiya), nika ikor ka'ayaway no Senmo isingan Tintokay nipa'acaan to no Nokay, saka mafalicay oya aniniay to a kaitiraan. Roma, I'ayaw kafana'en ni Augustin Siwsi mifalic ko Tawu kiwkay, orasaka oya ka'ayawan no kiwkay nano nipalomaan a sepatay tapangan a afinang a tolo tapangan, nilinahan patayra i aayawan no Paylenkay, oya kawiliay no fawahan makorahay nicengelan toloay tapangan afinong. Ci Augustin Siwsi tayni i Taywan ira ko 58 miheca, i 2003 mihecaan mapakaolah no Taytongsien cenfo to tadamanay finawlan, i 2017 miheca maopatodong to no Conghuaminko a kacingangan, o "Tada Taywan a finawlan (tamdaw)".
S.PHON: == ao~u~u*o~u~ustin siwsi == ao~u~u*o~u~ustin siwsi (b~b~vr. ao~u~u*o~u~ustin b~b~v*ʦħəɾ, smb~b~v; ****-), maso~ufo~uʦ i swit*ərɾanɬ~ɮ, ** ko~u miħəʦaan miʦo~umo~uɬ~ɮ i pajɾənkaj. mo~uətəpaj ko~u miħəʦaan no~u pajɾənkaj itini i po~uso~uŋ itija, maŋaɾaj to~u taɬ~ɮamanaj a kajki tamɬ~ɮaw, nano~uja maɾa saʡajawaj ʦiŋra no~u pajɾənkaj a siwsi tajni i tajwan, itija i **** miħəʦa miɬ~ɮaʡo~uʦ ko~u kaitini i tajwan. nai **** miħəʦa mitəka, taŋasa i **** miħəʦa ira ko~u ** miħəʦaan niŋra kaitini niŋra i tajwan. o~u ʦaħəɾakaj ʦi ao~u~u*o~u~ustin siwsi, mao~uɾaħ miɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮaŋo~uj, taŋasa anini ħinatajra ʦiŋra i rijar no~u tajpinjaŋ, mao~uɾaħ taɾaɾo~uto~uk miʦakiɾ, i **** miħəʦa patirəŋ to~u miʦakiɾaj to~u xiaŋjaŋ a ɾo~uto~uk, mirakat to~u ɾo~uto~uɾo~uto~uk, i **** miħəʦa itira i xiaŋjaŋ a miħəmək to~u ** miħəʦaan no~u ʡo~urip. ʦi ao~u~u*o~u~ustin siwsi o~u tataparan kiwiko~u, miɬ~ɮipo~utaj to~u taɾijo~uk a paɾo~uwaɬ~ɮaj, mikiħatija patirəŋ to~u tajto~uŋsiən miɬ~ɮipo~utaj to~u taɾijo~uk jo~ufajo~uf, misaħaɾaka to~u b~b~viwa fanaw ko~uħətiŋaj ko~ujiŋ, i **** miħəʦa mapakao~uɾaħ to~u "maɾaɾo~ukaj to~u ɾijo~uk isian taɬ~ɮamanaj tamɬ~ɮaw a ko~umpaj". kaɾawiɬ~ɮaŋ sa to~u kiɾaŋ ħana ʦi ao~u~u*o~u~ustin siwsi, aniniaj pajɾənkaj taɾijo~uk saħəto~u o~u nipaɾo~umaan niŋra a kaɾo~uħana. saki ʦi ao~u~u*o~u~ustin siwsian, ira ko~u ħana kiɾaŋ ato~u ɾo~uto~uk mato~u nijaro~uʡaj niŋra. ʦi ao~u~u*o~u~ustin siwsi to~u saki pajɾənkaj a ɾikisi ato~u kasasiro~umaan ɾiməɾaən ʦiŋra. taɾo~uɾo~uŋ ko~u maħiratəŋaj niŋra to~u matəɾaŋaj a kamaro~uʡan, itira i matəɾaŋaj kamaro~uʡan matajaɾ ira ko~u * miħəʦaan. parətatəŋa ʦiŋra to~u katəɾaŋaj kamaro~uʡan mimiŋ tato~u, pasiətip ko~u fawaħan, saro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ sa faʡəɬ~ɮət ko~u ɾaɾo~umaʡan, awaajħo~u ko~u sapiħpiħ to~u ɾiʡətəʦaj (ɾəŋʦi) itija, maro~urajan matajaɾ. itija, ʡaɾo~uman ko~u tajniaj i tajwan a simpo~u~u, maʦaʦo~uʡʦo~u ko~u kamaro~uʡan, itira saan ko~u ro~uma simpo~u~u i ʡariri patəɾian to~u ɾaɾo~usiɬ~ɮan, kaɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮəmakan a mafo~utiʡ, o~urasaka miʦo~uraʦo~ur saka itira i ħaŋʦo~u~u ɾaɾan mipatirəŋ to~u faʡəɾo~uħaj kaitiraan. o~u sənmo~u isiŋan tinto~ukaj i **** miħəʦa miɾijas to~u po~uso~uŋ, pato~uro~uɬ~ɮ ħananaj ko~u rənaj siwnikaj miko~uwan to~u isiŋan. miɬ~ɮo~uto~uʦ to~u ni ao~u~u*o~u~ustin siwsi a maħiratəŋaj, o~uja sənmo~u isiŋan tinto~ukaj to~u saki po~uso~uŋ saʡətaɾ a isiŋan maʡəɬ~ɮəŋaj ko~u matajaɾaj tamɬ~ɮaw to~u paɬ~ɮamaaj miɬ~ɮipo~ut to~u aɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮaaj itija, nika mikəto~un to~u piɾijas, tajra i ro~uma nijaro~uʡ mipataɬ~ɮo~u to~u tamɬ~ɮaw. miɬ~ɮo~uto~uʦ to~u ni ao~u~u*o~u~ustin siwsi, o~u kaʡajaw no~u fawħan mafaɾiʦ ko~u saʡajawaj a ħaɾaka no~u sənmo~u isiŋan tinto~ukaj. saka wiɾiaj no~u sənmo~u isiŋan tinto~ukaj ira ko~u ʦəʦaj tapaŋan a afinaŋ, o~u nano~u nipaɾo~umaan ni ao~u~u*o~u~ustin siwsi, o~u nano~u səra no~u no~ukaj ko~uja kaʡajaw no~u sənmo~u isiŋan tinto~ukaj, o~u niħaian no~u no~ukaj saka maŋaʡaj a misaɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮaħaɾ (aniniaj patəɾian to~u to~usija), nika iko~ur kaʡajawaj no~u sənmo~u isiŋan tinto~ukaj nipaʡaʦaan to~u no~u no~ukaj, saka mafaɾiʦaj o~uja aniniaj to~u a kaitiraan. ro~uma, iʡajaw kafanaʡən ni ao~u~u*o~u~ustin siwsi mifaɾiʦ ko~u tawo~u~u kiwkaj, o~urasaka o~uja kaʡajawan no~u kiwkaj nano~u nipaɾo~umaan a səpataj tapaŋan a afinaŋ a to~uɾo~u tapaŋan, niɾinaħan patajra i aajawan no~u pajɾənkaj, o~uja kawiɾiaj no~u fawaħan mako~uraħaj niʦəŋəɾan to~uɾo~uaj tapaŋan afino~uŋ. ʦi ao~u~u*o~u~ustin siwsi tajni i tajwan ira ko~u ** miħəʦa, i **** miħəʦaan mapakao~uɾaħ no~u tajto~uŋsiən ʦənfo~u to~u taɬ~ɮamanaj finawɾan, i **** miħəʦa mao~upato~uɬ~ɮo~uŋ to~u no~u ʦo~uŋħo~u~uaminko~u a kaʦiŋaŋan, o~u "taɬ~ɮa tajwan a finawɾan (tamɬ~ɮaw)".
